headline: Logistics Stock Drops 34% After Accounting Error as $30 Million Stake Emerges
summary: Hub Group delivers integrated freight and logistics services to a diverse North American client base across multiple industries.

headline: Why Analysts Love AppLovin Stock but the Market Doesn’t
summary: AppLovin (NASDAQ: APP) stock is trading at about $440 while the average analyst price target sits at $648.57, implying over 47% upside from current levels. The disconnect is striking given that the fundamentals remain strong. By most measures, AppLovin’s business has never been stronger.
